sentence: 警察正在调查这起谋杀案。
pinyin: Jǐngchá zhèngzài diàochá zhè qǐ móushā àn.
english: The police are investigating this murder case.

sentence: 声音需要通过介质才能传播。
pinyin: Shēngyīn xūyào tōngguò jièzhì cái néng chuánbō.
english: Sound needs a medium in order to travel.

sentence: 地铁是最常用的交通工具之一。
pinyin: Dìtiě shì zuì cháng yòng de jiāotōng gōngjù zhī yī.
english: The subway is one of the most commonly used means of transportation.

sentence: 他们周末去玩野战，玩得很开心。
pinyin: Tāmen zhōumò qù wán yězhàn, wán de hěn kāixīn.
english: They went to play paintball on the weekend and had a great time.

meaning: 1. (theater etc) to tour; 2. to be on tour; 3. to give itinerant perfo
sentence: 这支乐队正在全国巡演。
pinyin: Zhè zhī yuèduì zhèngzài quánguó xúnyǎn.
english: This band is currently on a nationwide tour.
